title: cypholophus reticulatus
intro: Cypholophus reticulatus, also known as the net-veined cypholophus or net-veined lippia, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family (Verbenaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cypholophus reticulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Cypholophus reticulatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be dried or used fresh to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
